title: buildah is out of sync with /etc/containers/storage.conf
body:
```
$ buildah --debug from docker-daemon:container-conductor-fedora-26:0.9.3rc0
ERRO[0000] overlay: Unknown option .override_kernel_check
overlay: Unknown option .override_kernel_check
```

Had to comment "override_kernel_check" out. Am running current git master.

comments.body:
Thats weird, I see it in storage.

```
grep -r override_kernel_check . 
./vendor/github.com/containers/storage/drivers/overlay/overlay.go:		case "overlay.override_kernel_check", "overlay2.override_kernel_check":
./vendor/github.com/containers/storage/store.go:	OverrideKernelCheck string `toml:"override_kernel_check"`
./vendor/github.com/containers/storage/store.go:		DefaultStoreOptions.GraphDriverOptions = append(DefaultStoreOptions.GraphDriverOptions, fmt.Sprintf("%s.override_kernel_check=%s", config.Storage.Driver, config.Storage.Options.OverrideKernelCheck))
```

```
buildah --debug from fedora
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: imagestore=/var/lib/nfs/storage     
DEBU[0000] overlay: size=20G                            
DEBU[0000] overlay: override_kernelcheck=true           
DEBU[0000] NewControl(/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay): nextProjectID = 4 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=xfs,  projectQuotaSupported=true   
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.imagestore=/var/lib/nfs/storage,overlay.size=20G,overlay.override_kernel_check=true]docker.io/library/fedora:latest" 
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.imagestore=/var/lib/nfs/storage,overlay.size=20G,overlay.override_kernel_check=true]docker.io/library/fedora:latest" 
DEBU[0000] exporting opaque data as blob "sha256:b0b140824a486ccc0f7968f3c6ceb6982b4b77e82ef8b4faaf2806049fc266df" 
DEBU[0000] SetQuota(/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/d5aaba9de639edd6a80f232677d22482a35975038b737988090b46a902b94ec1, 21474836480): projectID=4 
```

```
cat /etc/containers/storage.conf 
# See man 5 containers-storage.conf for more information
# The "container storage" table contains all of the server options.
[storage]

# Default Storage Driver
driver = "overlay"

# Temporary storage location
runroot = "/var/run/containers/storage"

# Primary Read/Write location of container storage
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"

[storage.options]
# AdditionalImageStores is used to pass paths to additional Read/Only image stores
# Must be comma separated list.
additionalimagestores = [
"/var/lib/nfs/storage"
]

size = "20G"

override_kernel_check = "true"
```
@TomasTomecek can you attach your /etc/containers/storage.conf, and the output from running `buildah version` and `buildah --version`?

I am getting a different error when debugging this -- can't reproduce the original issue. It works fine with `overlay`, having issues with `overlay2`.

```
$ sudo ./buildah --debug from docker-daemon:fedora:26
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay2"
WARN[0000] overlay: the backing xfs filesystem is formatted without d_type support, which leads to incorrect behavior. Reformat the filesystem with ftype=1 to enable d_type support. Running without d_type is not supported.
DEBU[0000] backingFs=xfs,  projectQuotaSupported=false
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage]docker.io/library/fedora:26"
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage]docker.io/library/fedora:26"
DEBU[0000] exporting opaque data as blob "sha256:ba857ff078531df1e486f6127d51d0b80ea0da690d2580ae1386929c8e66b1d3"
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay2"
WARN[0000] overlay: the backing xfs filesystem is formatted without d_type support, which leads to incorrect behavior. Reformat the filesystem with ftype=1 to enable d_type support. Running without d_type is not supported.
DEBU[0000] backingFs=xfs,  projectQuotaSupported=false
ERRO[0000] error creating container: lstat /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2/92cbfbc01b998a44ba04cc445ec1f9732075d71206d9d319c4b9400c16ddfbfb: no such file or directory
```

```
# storage.conf is the configuration file for all tools
# that share the containers/storage libraries
# See man 5 containers-storage.conf for more information

# The "container storage" table contains all of the server options.
[storage]

# Default Storage Driver
driver = "overlay2"

# Temporary storage location
runroot = "/var/run/containers/storage"

# Primary Read/Write location of container storage
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"

[storage.options]
# AdditionalImageStores is used to pass paths to additional Read/Only image stores
# Must be comma separated list.
additionalimagestores = [
]

# Size is used to set a maximum size of the container image.  Only supported by
# certain container storage drivers.
size = ""

# OverrideKernelCheck tells the driver to ignore kernel checks based on kernel version
override_kernel_check = "true"
```

```
buildah version 0.4 (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)

Version:       0.4
Go Version:    go1.9
Image Spec:    1.0.0
Runtime Spec:  1.0.0
Git Commit:    4d87007
Built:         Fri Nov  3 12:19:36 2017
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

```

I'm assuming the issue is lack of `d_type`. If so, feel free to close. No idea what happened originally. I believe that I `rm -rf`d `/var/lib/containers` to fix it.

That error suggests that a layer couldn't be found - did you remove `/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2` which is where the contents of the layers are stored, but not `/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2-layers` and `/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2-images`, which hold information about the relationships between layers, and about which images use which layers, respectively?

I pulled once more:

```

DEBU[0008] saved image metadata "{\"tag\":\"docker.io/library/fedora:26\",\"created-time\":\"2017-11-03T20:55:15.58420466+01:00\",\"id\":\"209e8e2bec6ffe340022f787c7f59862e231753c8c7c0d00f51cf5010ed1015e\",\"blob-list\":[{\"Digest\":\"sha256:fab2802aeea4acad60a0d1f618c8a4101bfa1cd1f4dde65f35880d2681ad0303\",\"Size\":241592320,\"URLs\":null,\"Annotations\":null},{\"Digest\":\"sha256:ba857ff078531df1e486f6127d51d0b80ea0da690d2580ae1386929c8e66b1d3\",\"Size\":1299,\"URLs\":null,\"Annotations\":null}],\"layers\":{\"sha256:fab2802aeea4acad60a0d1f618c8a4101bfa1cd1f4dde65f35880d2681ad0303\":[\"92cbfbc01b998a44ba04cc445ec1f9732075d71206d9d319c4b9400c16ddfbfb\"]},\"signature-sizes\":[]}"
DEBU[0008] exporting opaque data as blob "sha256:ba857ff078531df1e486f6127d51d0b80ea0da690d2580ae1386929c8e66b1d3"
DEBU[0008] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay2"
DEBU[0008] overlay: override_kernelcheck=true
WARN[0009] overlay: the backing xfs filesystem is formatted without d_type support, which leads to incorrect behavior. Reformat the filesystem with ftype=1 to enable d_type support. Running without d_type is not supported.
DEBU[0009] backingFs=xfs,  projectQuotaSupported=false
ERRO[0009] error creating container: lstat /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2/92cbfbc01b998a44ba04cc445ec1f9732075d71206d9d319c4b9400c16ddfbfb: no such file or directory
```

I find it interesting that `overlay` and `overlay2` are mixed in the output

Here's what the `storage.conf` says:

```
[storage]

# Default Storage Driver
driver = "overlay2"
```
Change to just use overlay, there is not difference in containers/storage.  We should always just use overlay.
right, thank you for helping me
